title: Image2 3D 포스터 - C4D May Day Mountain Tent
summary: Image2 Hub의 운영 / 3D 포스터 카테고리에서 가져온 이미지 생성 스타일입니다. 한국어 텍스트가 필요한 장면은 한국어 라벨과 카피를 사용하도록 조정했습니다.
prompt: Following the standards of a holiday marketing visual designer, create a vertical 3D poster for May 1st Labor Day with the theme "5/1 Go Camping · Embrace Nature · Feel the Good · LET'S GO CAMPING". Off-white minimalist background, yellow-and-pink 3D balloon letters "5/1" and green-and-black 3D letters "Go Camping". Below: a snow-capped little mountain, a yellow-and-white striped tent, a campfire, smiley flowers and a small stream. Overall fresh and small-town style, 3D clay aesthetic, generous whitespace composition. Use Korean-language copy, labels, captions, titles, and UI text wherever text appears; keep all text readable and culturally natural for Korean users.
